page_metadata.biotools__summary: The iPick program is available as a module for the POKY and NMRFAM-SPARKY. It is highly recommended that you use the module instead of the command line tool. The main reasons are the ease of work and the extended capabilities provided in the module.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The iPick program is available as a module for the POKY and NMRFAM-SPARKY. It is highly recommended that you use the module instead of the command line tool. The main reasons are the ease of work and the extended capabilities provided in the module.
